creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


I can not reproduce the problem you see. 
Please compare teh output of make configure 
with the output from an official build. 

pick one from: 
http://people.freebsd.org/~dinoex/buildlogs/graphics,graphviz.html 

e.g. 
http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/amd64-9-latest-logs/graphviz-2.28.0.log 
http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/i386-9-latest-logs/graphviz-2.28.0.log
